productDisplayName: Peter England Men Casual Brown Belt
description: A style essential, the belt is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed male. peter england perfects this traditional accessory's foray into  modern wardrobes with its classic techniques and innovative designs. Wear this piece with corduroy trousers or denims, casual shoes and t-shirts. Length:95 cmMade of synthetic leather Tang clasp for a snug FitHoles to customise fitFixed loop near the buckle to hold belt in placeTwo lined contrast stitch detailing along the centre for styleWash careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not store in sunlight
